mapper.sql: p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, sku.id AS sku_id, sku.sku_code, sku.spec_json AS sku_spec_json, p.status AS product_status, sku.status AS sku_status, COALESCE(s.total, 0) AS total, COALESCE(s.locked, 0) AS locked, COALESCE(s.available, 0) AS available, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.pay_time >= #{start7} AND o.pay_time <= #{asOf} THEN oi.quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS confirmed_qty7d, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.pay_time >= #{start30} AND o.pay_time <= #{asOf} THEN oi.quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS confirmed_qty30d, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.pay_time >= #{start90} AND o.pay_time <= #{asOf} THEN oi.quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS confirmed_qty90d, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.created_at >= #{start30} AND o.created_at <= #{asOf} AND o.status NOT IN (4, 5) THEN oi.quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS demand_qty30d, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.pay_time >= #{start30} AND o.pay_time <= #{asOf} THEN oi.subtotal ELSE 0 END), 0.00) AS confirmed_revenue30d, MAX(CASE WHEN o.pay_time IS NOT NULL AND o.pay_time <= #{asOf} THEN o.pay_time ELSE NULL END) AS last_confirmed_sale_at, sku.created_at AS sku_created_at

FROM t_product_sku sku JOIN t_product p ON p.id = sku.product_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN t_stock s ON s.sku_id = sku.id LEFT JOIN t_order_item oi ON oi.sku_id = sku.id LEFT JOIN t_order o ON o.id = oi.order_id AND o.deleted = 0
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, sku.id, sku.sku_code, sku.spec_json, p.status, sku.status, s.total, s.locked, s.available, sku.created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
AND ( p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sku.sku_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT o.pay_time AS paid_at, oi.quantity, oi.subtotal FROM t_order_item oi JOIN t_order o ON o.id = oi.order_id AND o.deleted = 0 WHERE oi.sku_id = #{skuId} AND o.pay_time IS NOT NULL AND o.pay_time <= #{asOf} ORDER BY o.pay_time DESC, oi.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT action, quantity, before_total, after_total, before_locked, after_locked, before_available, after_available, reference_no, created_at FROM t_stock_ledger WHERE sku_id = #{skuId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
